nasb.text: You gave Your good Spirit to instruct them, Your manna You did not withhold from their mouth, And You gave them water for their thirst.

esv.text: You gave your good Spirit to instruct them and did not withhold your manna from their mouth and gave them water for their thirst.

cnv.text: 你賜下良善的靈教導他們； 你沒有留住嗎哪不給他們吃； 你給他們水解渴。

ccb.text: 你差遣你良善的灵去教导他们，没有停止赐他们吗哪吃，也没有停止赐他们水喝。
